goal: Validate the integrated FileEasy v1 product path from APK shell entry assumptions through upload page flow, upload backend behavior, and admin-page management behavior using the approved integration checklist.
nonGoals: Do not implement new product features.
Do not expand product scope beyond the approved PRD.
Do not silently fix code during validation unless PM opens a separate blocker-fix task.

acceptanceChecks.text: The task should evaluate the integrated path from FileEasy entry assumptions to upload page flow, resumable upload flow, and admin-page management flow against the approved integration checklist.
The task should clearly separate passed scenarios, failed scenarios, release blockers, and non-blocking follow-ups.
The final report should give PM a clear go/no-go recommendation for moving toward release closure or launching blocker-fix tasks.

handoffQuestions: List only the blockers that must be fixed before FileEasy can enter release-closure review.
